header.statusSubtitle: This is the most recent status recorded

details.title: Order details
details.subtitle: Order #{{id}}
details.confirmedDesc: We have received your request and it is being processed
details.emailSentDesc: You will receive an email with your order details
details.preparingDesc: We will start preparing your benefits soon

nextSteps.title: What's next?
nextSteps.step1: We will contact you to coordinate the delivery of your benefits
nextSteps.step2: You can track your order status in your profile
nextSteps.step3: Any questions, contact us via WhatsApp

whatsapp.message: Hello, I need help with my order #{{id}} at {{siteName}}.

wompiVerifying.title: Verifying your payment
wompiVerifying.subtitle: Your order has been created. We are waiting for payment confirmation from the financial institution.
wompiVerifying.confirmedSubtitle: Your payment was successfully verified. Your order is being processed.
wompiVerifying.confirmed: Your card payment has been confirmed!
wompiVerifying.step1Desc: Your payment is being verified by the financial institution. This may take a few minutes.
wompiVerifying.step2Desc: Your order has been registered and will be processed once payment is confirmed.
wompiVerifying.step3Desc: No further action needed. The status will update automatically when confirmed.
wompiVerifying.confirmedStep1Desc: Your payment was successfully verified by Wompi.
wompiVerifying.pollingExhausted: Automatic verification has ended. If you completed the payment, it will be confirmed automatically and we will notify you by email.
wompiVerifying.nextStep1: Your financial institution is processing the transaction
wompiVerifying.nextStep2: This page will update automatically when confirmed
wompiVerifying.nextStep3: You can also close this page, we will notify you by email
wompiVerifying.declinedSubtitle: Your payment was not approved by the financial institution. The order has been cancelled.
wompiVerifying.declinedAlert: Your payment was declined by the financial institution.
wompiVerifying.declinedStep1Desc: The financial institution declined the transaction. No charges were made.
wompiVerifying.declinedStep2Desc: The associated order was automatically cancelled. You can try again.
wompiVerifying.declinedNextStep1: Verify that your card details are correct
wompiVerifying.declinedNextStep2: Contact your bank if the problem persists
wompiVerifying.orderFailedSubtitle: Your payment was processed successfully, but there was an issue creating your order. Don't worry, our team will resolve it.
wompiVerifying.orderFailedStep1Desc: Your payment was successfully charged by the financial institution.
wompiVerifying.orderFailedStep2Desc: There was a technical issue registering your order. Our team will be notified automatically.
wompiVerifying.orderFailedNextStep1: Do not make another payment — your money is safe
wompiVerifying.orderFailedNextStep2: Contact us via WhatsApp to resolve your case quickly
wompiVerifying.orderFailedNextStep3: Our team can verify your payment and create your order manually

footer.thanks: Thank you for being part of our club!
footer.message: At {{siteName}} we value your trust and hope you enjoy your benefits.
